subject: feat(theme): migrate shared, modal, and partial layout components to DaisyUI tokens
body:
Continues TW4+DaisyUI migration. Migrates AIPromptHelper, ContextBar,
EmptyStateGuide, FreeformEditor, InstallInstructionsModal,
KeyboardShortcutsOverlay, QuickActionsBar, ReaderMode,
SampleImagesSection, StyleTab, TemplatesTab, and App.jsx from
hand-rolled semantic tokens and dark: class pairs to DaisyUI base/primary
tokens. Remaining tab components (LayoutTab, ExportButtons, MediaTab,
PlatformPreview) still in progress.

Tags: theme, daisyui, components, migration
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: major

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QDdpPbsw1PaMMrwihoc5hG
